name: Improper Access Control
description: This is a Pillar-level CWE (the most abstract level). The product does not restrict or incorrectly restricts access to a resource from an unauthorized actor. MITRE discourages mapping to this CWE directly; more specific descendants like CWE-862, CWE-306, or CWE-732 should be used instead.
detection_pattern: N/A — Pillar-level abstraction, too broad for specific detection pattern. Use descendant CWEs (CWE-862, CWE-863, CWE-287, CWE-306, CWE-732) for actionable detection.
